text:
[00000001] main libvlc debug: translation test: code is ""

The test obviously fails, it should report "Ru"

For a yet undetermined reason, the generated gmo files are sometimes
corrupted, running make clean all install in
multimedia/vlc/work/vlc-0.8.6h/po should "fix" the problem.
